spots.name: 綠島（柴口、大白沙等）
spots.description: 黑潮帶來清澈海水與豐富珊瑚礁，為台灣最具代表性的潛點之一。
spots.descriptionEn: Kuroshio-fed clear water and coral reefs; one of Taiwan's signature destinations.
spots.safetyNotes: 注意海流與船隻交通；依規定使用浮力裝置與潛水旗。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Watch currents and boat traffic; use SMB/flag per local practice.

spots.name: 蘭嶼（開元港周邊）
spots.description: 火山島地形與陡降坡，能見度常極佳，適合進階路線規劃。
spots.descriptionEn: Volcanic terrain with drop-offs; often excellent viz for advanced planning.
spots.safetyNotes: 離島醫療資源有限；天候變化快，需保留安全餘裕。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Limited medical facilities offshore; weather changes quickly.

spots.name: 墾丁後壁湖
spots.description: 保護區內珊瑚與熱帶魚類集中，適合訓練與休閒潛水。
spots.descriptionEn: Protected area with dense coral and fish; good for training and fun dives.
spots.safetyNotes: 假日人潮與浮潛者眾多，注意水面活動與浮力控制。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Crowded on holidays; mind snorkelers and buoyancy.

spots.name: 小琉球花瓶岩
spots.description: 珊瑚礁海岸與海龜棲地，能見度穩定時體驗極佳。
spots.descriptionEn: Reef coast and turtle habitat; great when viz is stable.
spots.safetyNotes: 海龜為保育類，禁止觸摸與追逐；保持距離。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Sea turtles are protected — no touching or chasing.

spots.name: 東北角龍洞
spots.description: 北台灣最方便的岸潛區之一，地形變化與微距生態豐富。
spots.descriptionEn: Accessible shore diving in northern Taiwan; macro-friendly terrain.
spots.safetyNotes: 東北季風期浪況大，務必確認海象與入水點。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Rough in NE monsoon — check sea state and entry points.

spots.name: 澎湖望安網垵口
spots.description: 沙灘與淺礁交錯，適合輕鬆漫潛與夜潛觀察。
spots.descriptionEn: Sand and shallow reef mix; relaxed diving and night critters.
spots.safetyNotes: 潮汐與水流可能影響入出水；夜潛需結伴與燈號。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Tides/current affect entries; night dives need buddy and lights.

spots.name: 綠島自由潛水（開放水域）
spots.description: 深水訓練與深度課程常選地點，海況穩定時能見度佳。
spots.descriptionEn: Popular for depth training when conditions are stable.
spots.safetyNotes: 自由潛水須遵守安全戒護與恢復呼吸規範；禁止獨潛。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Use proper safety protocols; never freedive alone.

spots.name: 墾丁自由潛水（海域訓練）
spots.description: 平靜海域利於初階與中階課程，搭配岸邊教學設施。
spots.descriptionEn: Calm areas suit beginner to intermediate line training.
spots.safetyNotes: 注意水面船隻與浮球標示；遵守教練戒護指令。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Mind boat traffic and surface markers; follow coach briefings.

spots.name: 小琉球自由潛水
spots.description: 淺礁與沙地適合恆重與攀繩練習，生態觀察豐富。
spots.descriptionEn: Shallow reef and sand for CWT and line practice.
spots.safetyNotes: 保育區內避免觸底揚沙；與浮潛者保持安全距離。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Avoid stirring sand in protected zones; distance from snorkelers.

spots.name: 東北角自由潛水
spots.description: 北部少有之開放訓練點，夏季海況較適合深度練習。
spots.descriptionEn: One of few northern open training spots; summer is more reliable.
spots.safetyNotes: 水溫較低需保暖；注意浪與离岸流。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Cooler water — suit up; watch swell and rip currents.

spots.name: 墾丁萬里桐
spots.description: 台灣馬爾地夫般的無敵海景，沙地與珊瑚交錯，適合新手岸潛與拍照。常見小丑魚與熱帶魚群。
spots.descriptionEn: Maldives-like scenery in Taiwan. Sandy bottom mixed with coral, perfect for beginner shore dives and photography.
spots.safetyNotes: 岸潛為主，注意礁石與潮汐；假日浮潛者多，保持浮力控制。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Mainly shore dive; watch tides and rocks. Busy with snorkelers on holidays.

spots.name: 墾丁船帆石
spots.description: 春夏常有沙丁魚風暴，珊瑚礁與魚群壯觀，適合中級潛水。
spots.descriptionEn: Famous for sardine tornado in spring/summer. Spectacular fish balls and reefs.
spots.safetyNotes: 沙丁魚季魚群密集，注意方向感；有時有強流。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Dense fish schools during sardine season — maintain orientation.

spots.name: 綠島大香菇（石朗）
spots.description: 全世界最大的微孔珊瑚體之一（估計1200年以上），石朗保護區內經典潛點。
spots.descriptionEn: One of the world's largest micro-atoll corals, estimated over 1,200 years old.
spots.safetyNotes: 保護區內禁止觸碰珊瑚；能見度高但注意海流。
spots.safetyNotesEn: No touching coral in protected area; strong currents possible.

spots.name: 綠島鋼鐵礁
spots.description: 人工魚礁吸引大量燕魚，常出現「燕魚風暴」，夜潛也很精彩。
spots.descriptionEn: Artificial reefs famous for batfish swarms — sometimes called 'batfish storm'.
spots.safetyNotes: 深度較深，適合有經驗者；夜潛需燈具與結伴。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Deeper site; good for experienced divers. Lights required for night dives.

spots.name: 蘭嶼玉女岩
spots.description: 蘭嶼經典地形潛點，陡坡與珊瑚豐富，常見大型魚類。
spots.descriptionEn: Iconic drop-off site with rich coral and pelagic fish.
spots.safetyNotes: 黑潮影響，海流較強；建議船潛並有經驗者前往。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Strong Kuroshio currents possible; boat dive recommended.

spots.name: 蘭嶼八代灣沉船
spots.description: 沉船遺跡與周邊陡壁，能見度極高，適合進階潛水。
spots.descriptionEn: Shipwreck with dramatic walls and exceptional visibility.
spots.safetyNotes: 深度與海流需注意；醫療資源有限。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Deeper wreck dive; limited medical facilities on island.

spots.name: 小琉球美人洞
spots.description: 小琉球海龜密度最高區域之一，珊瑚與海龜幾乎每次都可見。
spots.descriptionEn: Highest sea turtle density site on Xiaoliuqiu; turtles almost guaranteed.
spots.safetyNotes: 嚴禁觸摸或追逐海龜；保護區規則嚴格。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Strictly no touching or chasing turtles.

spots.name: 小琉球龍蝦洞
spots.description: 洞穴地形與豐富生態，適合中級潛水，常見龍蝦與海龜。
spots.descriptionEn: Cave-like terrain with lobsters and turtles.
spots.safetyNotes: 洞穴區域需小心導航；注意水流。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Careful navigation near caves; currents possible.

spots.name: 澎湖七美島
spots.description: 澎湖外島代表潛點，沙灘與珊瑚交錯，適合全家與輕鬆潛水。
spots.descriptionEn: Classic Penghu island dive with beaches and coral gardens.
spots.safetyNotes: 離島天候變化快；注意潮汐與船隻。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Remote island — weather changes quickly.

spots.name: 鼻頭角自由潛水
spots.description: 北部岸潛友善區域，奇岩地形與豐富微距生態，適合自由潛水練習。
spots.descriptionEn: Accessible northern shore spot with unique rock formations and macro life.
spots.safetyNotes: 東北季風期浪大；注意離岸流。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Rough during NE monsoon; watch rip currents.

spots.name: 墾丁南灣
spots.description: 平緩沙地與珊瑚，適合初學與中階自由潛水課程。
spots.descriptionEn: Gentle sandy bottom ideal for beginner to intermediate freediving training.
spots.safetyNotes: 注意水面船隻與浮潛者；遵守教練指示。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Watch boat traffic and snorkelers.

spots.name: 澎湖忘憂島（南方四島）
spots.description: 夢幻紫色珊瑚森林，南方四島國家公園內，生態保護完善。
spots.descriptionEn: Dreamlike purple coral forests in the Southern Four Islands National Park.
spots.safetyNotes: 國家公園規則嚴格；需船潛並遵守生態規範。
spots.safetyNotesEn: Strict national park rules; boat dive only.
